name: Phoenix Pawn & Guns
description_short: Phoenix Pawn & Guns specializes in collateral-based loans and direct purchases of firearms, offering fast cash for guns in exchange for ownership or short-term pawn agreements.
description_long:
Phoenix Pawn & Guns operates as a specialized pawn shop focused exclusively on firearms in the Phoenix metropolitan area. The company positions itself as a premier gun buyer and seller serving Phoenix, Glendale, Tempe, Mesa, and Scottsdale. They accept all firearm types as collateral or for direct purchase, including modern guns, vintage pieces, collectibles, and foreign models. The business model centers on providing immediate cash access through either pawn loans (temporary collateral-based borrowing) or outright gun purchases.

The company offers gun pawn loans with stated competitive interest rates and the ability to secure funds within minutes. They also buy firearms directly, claiming to pay top-market prices for new, used, and antique guns. Their service extends to free professional appraisals conducted by trained staff. The shop operates seven days per week and maintains a 24-hour monitored and insured storage facility (insured by Lloyds of London) for items held as collateral. They handle specialty categories including front-loading muskets, vintage Navy Colt pistols, and foreign brands like Luger, Beretta, Walther, and Browning.

Phoenix Pawn & Guns differentiates itself through claims of employing trained firearms experts for accurate appraisals, offering competitive pricing guarantees across the service area, and maintaining professional-grade security infrastructure. The company emphasizes the combination of "most cash" payouts with "lowest interest in town" for pawn loans. They market their seven-day operation and willingness to accept any gun type regardless of condition as competitive advantages. The secure storage with Lloyd's of London insurance is presented as a trust-building feature for customers pawning valuable items.

As a pawn shop, Phoenix Pawn & Guns serves a legitimate financial function for gun owners seeking liquidity, but the service carries inherent limitations and considerations. Pawn loans typically involve higher interest rates than traditional financing despite company claims of competitiveness. The collateral-based model means customers must surrender valuable assets to access cash. Transparency about specific interest rates, loan terms, and redemption requirements is not detailed on the website, which is typical but creates an information gap for prospective borrowers.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Professional appraisals by trained firearms experts ensure accurate valuations
24-hour monitored and insured storage (Lloyds of London) protects pawned firearms
Seven-day-per-week operation provides consistent access and flexibility
Accepts all firearm types including specialty, vintage, and collectible guns
Immediate cash availability—loans funded within minutes per website claims
Serves multi-city area (Phoenix, Glendale, Tempe, Mesa, Scottsdale) with consistent pricing
Direct gun purchase option provides alternative to pawn loans for those wanting to sell outright
cons: No specific interest rates or loan terms disclosed on website, creating transparency gaps
Pawn loans typically carry higher interest rates than traditional personal loans, despite 'lowest interest' claims
Customers must relinquish valuable firearms during pawn period, creating asset risk and access loss
No information on redemption periods, late fees, or default consequences
Limited to firearm collateral only—cannot serve customers with other asset types
best_for: Gun owners needing emergency cash who prefer not to sell permanently
Collectors and dealers with specialty or vintage firearms requiring expert appraisal
Individuals in the Phoenix metro area seeking same-day liquidity against firearm assets
Gun sellers seeking competitive pricing through professional valuation
diagnosis: Phoenix Pawn & Guns is best suited for gun owners in the greater Phoenix area who need immediate cash and prefer using firearms as collateral rather than selling permanently, or for those seeking expert appraisal and competitive pricing on firearm sales. The primary caveat is that pawn loans involve surrendering valuable assets and typically carry interest rates higher than traditional financing options, so this should be considered only when immediate liquidity is necessary and asset surrender is acceptable.
services: Gun pawn loans (short-term collateral-based cash advances)
Pawn loans on rifles, handguns, shotguns, and magnums
Antique and vintage firearm evaluation and cash purchase
Secured 24-hour monitored storage and insurance for pawned items
Buyout services for used and old firearms
Competitive pricing guarantees across Phoenix/Mesa/Scottsdale region
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 2803 W Van Buren St, Phoenix, AZ 85009
